'''sadhobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylologist|xylologist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylologist|xylologist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sadhobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sædhebeth|sædhebeth]] || [[word:sædhebej|sædhebej]] || [[word:sædhebesh|sædhebesh]] || [[word:sædhebe|sædhebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadhodhoboth|sadhodhoboth]] || [[word:sadhodhoboj|sadhodhoboj]] || [[word:sadhodhobosh|sadhodhobosh]] || [[word:sadhodhobo|sadhodhobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadhoboth|sadhoboth]] || [[word:sadhoboj|sadhoboj]] || [[word:sadhobosh|sadhobosh]] || [[word:sadhobo|sadhobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadhofboth|sadhofboth]] || [[word:sadhofboj|sadhofboj]] || [[word:sadhofbosh|sadhofbosh]] || [[word:sadhofbof|sadhofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sadhobotho|sadhobotho]] || [[word:sadhobojo|sadhobojo]] || [[word:sadhobosho|sadhobosho]] || [[word:sadhoboko|sadhoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sadhoboth|sadhoboth]] || [[word:sadhoboj|sadhoboj]] || [[word:sadhobosh|sadhobosh]] || [[word:sadhobo|sadhobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sadhobothol|sadhobothol]] || [[word:sadhobojol|sadhobojol]] || [[word:sadhoboshol|sadhoboshol]] || [[word:sadhobokol|sadhobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sadhobothotho|sadhobothotho]] || [[word:sadhobojojo|sadhobojojo]] || [[word:sadhoboshosho|sadhoboshosho]] || [[word:sadhoboko|sadhoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sadhobothon|sadhobothon]] || [[word:sadhobojon|sadhobojon]] || [[word:sadhoboshon|sadhoboshon]] || [[word:sadhobokon|sadhobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sadhobothoro|sadhobothoro]] || [[word:sadhobojoro|sadhobojoro]] || [[word:sadhoboshoro|sadhoboshoro]] || [[word:sadhobokoro|sadhobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
